description: The Hard Livings gang is a large street gang and organized crime group based in Manenberg, Cape Town, South Africa. Founded in 1971 by twins Rashied and Rashaad Staggie, it evolved from a street gang into a structured criminal organization involved in drug trafficking, weapon trafficking, prostitution, contract killing, extortion, illegal diamond smuggling, and other crimes. The gang was one of two 'super gangs' in Cape Town, rivaling The Americans, and has international connections including with the Sicilian Mafia. After Rashaad was killed by vigilante group PAGAD in 1996, and Rashied in 2019, the gang remains active.
